strings.tag: Hi [name], this is a test string from room011 - interrogation room.
It's you again.
It was not supposed to be like this. I just tried to protect myself.....and then he died.....
We were at my office. He was so angry.....he grabbed my neck so tight that I couldn't breathe....I bit him, but he didn't let go until I used the syringe...
It was because of Apollo. Poor dog...he was sick too often...So, I reported my evaluation to the SPCA. Marco Williams was so mad at me when he knew about this report.
He fell and hit his head on the examination table. There was a lot of blood, then I realized he was dead....It was an accident. I didn't mean to kill anybody.
I was afraid.....I didn't have time to think...So, I just snuck his body back to the RV.
All evidence points to your involvement in the death of Marco Williams.
Can you tell me what happened?
Why was he angry with you?
What happened after you used the syringe?
Why did you move the body?
See you in court.
The Vegas Chronicle
Prized Dog Found!
CONGRATULATIONS!

You've solved the case.

Stay tuned for CSI: The Experience Case Three
A Dog Eat Dog World
Meanwhile, make sure to check out the links below:
For cool links and more online CSI activities:
To leave feedback about this web adventure:
To return to the homepage:
Click Here!

The DA charged Sariel Knox with manslaughter. Dr Knox has been advised by her lawyer to plead self-defense and is currently out on bail awaiting her trial. On the day of the crime, the SPCA responded to the call by Dr. Knox and picked up Apollo. Abuse was not established and Apollo was returned safely to Deborah Ranger. Ms Ranger continues to show Apollo competitively. Wesley Murphy was banned from the competition for attempting to poison Apollo. He is no longer allowed in dog show competitions.
